<!-- Brief description of the change -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🔧 Fix — broken link, wrong URL, incorrect cert name, duplicate removal
- [ ] ➕ Addition — new tool, resource, book, cert, channel, vendor, or person
- [ ] 📄 New page — new discipline page or reference document
- [ ] 📊 Data — JSONL edge table addition or correction
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure — workflow, site config, templates

## Checklist

- [ ] All links in my change actually work
- [ ] I haven't introduced duplicate entries
- [ ] Certification names and issuers are accurate (with source if changed)
- [ ] Tool/repo URLs point to the correct location
- [ ] If I added JSONL data: `python scripts/validate_jsonl.py` passes locally
- [ ] I've followed the table format of the existing file
